# GitHub profile viewer

This is a simple dashboard that displays information about a GitHub's user
account.

## Features

* Show the user's avatar, bio, follower counts, contact metadata
* Repository analyics - stars, forks, and most used languages
* LocalStorage caching: cache searched results for 10 minutes to avoid GitHub's
public API rate limiting, with live synchronization if needed.
* Input Sanitation - Sanitize input usernames before searching
* Search History - store the last 5 searches as clickable bookmarks

## Project Directory Structure (generated by tree(1) with comments)

.
├── components/
│   ├── ProfileCard.jsx       # Renders developer bio, basic stats, and sync triggers.
│   ├── SearchForm.jsx        # Handles form text inputs and context submission.
│   ├── SearchHistory.jsx     # Renders historical bookmarks safely during processing.
│   └── StatsDashboard.jsx    # Calculates language weights, ratios, and star power aggregates.
├── service/
│   └── githubService.js      # Handles data-fetching, cache matching, and rate-limit parsing.
├── App.jsx                   # Primary state orchestrator and validation gatekeeper.
└── index.css                 # Central dark-mode stylesheet and skeleton animations.
